title: Adjust indentation
description: Adjusts the first line indentation for all paragraphs in your presentation.

title: Align charts
description: Aligns charts and text boxes on every slide.

title: Apply corporate branding
description: Applies corporate branding styles to a presentation, including text color, font, and logo placement.

title: Apply font style
description: Applies a consistent font style across all the slides.

title: Autoplaceholder
description: Automatically fills empty text boxes on slides with placeholder content and arranges texts in a structured format.

title: Bold bullet points
description: Automatically bolds the first word of each bullet point that contains a colon ( : ) or a dash ( – ).

title: Change background color
description: Sets blue color as the background of even indexed slides, if it is odd sets an image.

title: Change font family and size
description: Changes the font family and/or size on all the slides in your presentation.

title: Content alignment tool
description: Consistently aligns text boxes and images throughout the entire presentation.

title: Count number of shapes
description: Counts the total number of shapes in a presentation by iterating through all slides and displays the count on a newly created slide.

title: Create slides from list items
description: Creates new slides based on the listed items in the current slide. Each list item becomes a slide title.

title: Format bullet points
description: Applies consistent formatting to bullet points.

title: Format slide titless
description: Formats the title of each slide in a presentation. It sets the font, font size, justification, and vertical text alignment for the title.

title: Generate outline
description: Automatically generates a presentation outline based on titles.

title: Hyperlinks to QR codes
description: Converts all the hyperlinks in the presentation into QR codes using an external API.

title: Remove duplicate slides
description: Remove duplicate slides across the entire presentation.

title: Remove empty paragraphs
description: Deletes all unnecessary blank paragraphs across the entire presentation.

title: Remove empty text boxes
description: Deletes all empty text box shapes throughout the entire presentation.

title: Remove extra spaces
description: Removes extra spaces from all text in all slides of a presentation.

title: Remove shapes from slides
description: Removes shapes from slides in a presentation.

title: Remove slides
description: Removes slides from your presentation based on the slide title.

title: Split slides
description: Splits slides in a presentation that contain more than 100 words into multiple slides.

title: Table to chart
description: Generates a chart based on the selected table data.
